creator: naru@nk.rim.or.jp
text:
Update ports japanese/navi2ch* to 1.8.0, and Main emacs editer to 22.x.
Remove files: files/{patch-bourbon,patch-myanmar,patch-navi2ch-list.el}

MASTERDIR: copy all-files navi2ch-emacs21 to navi2ch
new masterdir name is 'navi2ch'.(not navi2ch-emacs22)
navi2ch-emacs21 change Makefile only.
navi2ch-xemacs21-mule modify Makefile.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
